iframe_realm_leak.verdict: FAIL — emitCrossRealmInstaller did not patch iframe-realm Function.prototype.toString

diff_vs_stage4_baseline: identical: M7.11 main-world fixes do not affect CreepJS verdict because the leak is cross-realm
root_cause_hypothesis: emitCrossRealmInstaller probably installs via iframe.addEventListener("load",...) + MutationObserver, but for an about:blank iframe (synchronous, no network) load may already have fired before install.
Or: maskInstallerExpr captured a reference to the OUTER realm Function.prototype.toString rather than calling the install routine against frameWin.Function.prototype.toString in the inner realm.
Next step: read src/capabilities/stealthHook.ts emitCrossRealmInstaller + emitToStringMasking and check whether installInFrame actually patches frameWin.Function.prototype.toString.
